posts.author: cjkvlot (Cees Vlot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone,

I have a question about automation and sub tasks. I have a task and this task is assigned to a person. I have an automation rule that when the status of the task change to “UPDATE” the automation will create a new subtask. That work perfectly. But what I want to add is the person to this sub task. And de person is always the same as the person of the main task.

Question is. Can you create a sub taks and assign automaticly the person to this sub task depending on the person of the main task?

Thanks for any help in advance!

Cees
